10 Python Tips Every Developer Should Know

Alice Martin August 15, 2024

Python is one of the most versatile programming languages out there. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced developer, these tips will help you write cleaner, faster code.

1. Use List Comprehensions

List comprehensions are a concise way to create lists. Instead of using a for loop, you can do it in one line.

2. F-strings for Formatting

F-strings are faster and more readable than other string formatting methods.

5 Comments

  1. Bob Developer August 15, 2024

    Great list! I'd also add using dataclasses for cleaner data structures. They save so much boilerplate.

    1. Alice Martin August 15, 2024

      Good point! Dataclasses are definitely underrated. I might do a follow-up post on them.

  2. Carol Pythonista August 16, 2024

    Tip #2 is so true. I switched to f-strings last year and never looked back. The performance improvement is noticeable too.

    Would love to see a similar list for async Python patterns.
